---
title: "CV"
search: false
format:
  html:
    meta:
      description: "Education and selected professional background for Ben Brintz."
    css: cv_styles.css
---

::: {.cv-card}
**Ben J. Brintz**  
[ben.brintz@hsc.utah.edu](mailto:ben.brintz@hsc.utah.edu)

## Education

**PhD in Statistics**, Oregon State, Corvallis, OR, March 2018  
Dissertation: A Normal Approximation to N-Mixture Models with Applications in Large Abundance Estimation and Disease Surveillance

**MS in Statistics**, Oregon State, Corvallis, OR, June 2014  
Conducted simulation work and hierarchical modeling for ecological sampling and precision analysis.

**BA in Mathematics/Statistics**, Grinnell College, Grinnell, IA, May 2010
:::
